productDisplayName: Nike Men Black Multicourt Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteSuperior grip in an ultra-lightweight package, these Multi Court tennis shoes from nike come with ample cushioning and support to help you slam those winning aces. Team this with tennis performance clothes when hitting the court, or simply pair them with jeans and t-shirts for that casual look.Product DetailsBlack shoe with mesh upper, synthetic overlays and central lace-upsPadded tongue and innerFoamy rubber midsoleTPU outsole with multi-directional grooves, scooped midfoot and a pivot point on the forefoot Material and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in sunlight
